meaning: n.柳树,柳木制品adj.柳木制的
examples: The baskets are woven from strips of willow.
The strips of willow are woven into baskets.
Jenny weaves baskets from willow she grows herself.
National Airlines was based until recently at Michigan's Willow Run Airport, west of Detroit.
Then a willow tree fell at his home in Connecticut, smashing onto his court.
